title: Middle Eastern Fragrant Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic rice pilaf infused with the warmth of the Middle East, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for an additional minute.
Add the turmeric, cumin, and salt. Stir to combine.
Add the fragrant rice and ayurvedic red rice. Stir to coat the rice with the spice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
